title: Supply Chain Manager - FedEx India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - FedEx India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FedEx India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About FedEx India:
FedEx India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FedEx India!
